scripts.debug: WASM_LOG=${WASM_LOG:-[wasm_trace]=debug} RUST_LOG=${RUST_LOG:-holochain=warn} LAIR_KEYSTORE_DISABLE_MLOCK=1 AGENTS=${AGENTS:-3} BOOTSTRAP_PORT=$(get-port) SIGNAL_PORT=$(get-port) npm run network
scripts.start: AGENTS=${AGENTS:-3} BOOTSTRAP_PORT=$(get-port) SIGNAL_PORT=$(get-port) npm run network
scripts.network: hc sandbox clean && npm run build:happ && UI_PORT=$(get-port) concurrently "npm run start --workspace ui" "npm run launch:happ" "hc playground"
scripts.build:test-zomes: RUSTFLAGS='--cfg getrandom_backend="custom"' cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --workspace --exclude sweettest --features test-epoch
scripts.build:test-dna: npm run build:test-zomes && hc dna pack dnas/edet/workdir --output dnas/edet/workdir/edet-test.dna
scripts.test: npm run build:test-dna && LAIR_KEYSTORE_DISABLE_MLOCK=1 cargo nextest run -p sweettest
scripts.test:ci: npm run build:test-dna && LAIR_KEYSTORE_DISABLE_MLOCK=1 cargo nextest run -p sweettest --profile ci
scripts.package: npm run build:happ && npm run package --workspace ui && hc web-app pack workdir --recursive
scripts.build:happ: npm run build:zomes && hc app pack workdir --recursive
scripts.build:zomes: RUSTFLAGS='--cfg getrandom_backend="custom"' cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --workspace --exclude sweettest
